title: Manual Gift False Popup — Engineering Report

root_cause.summary: getOldestPendingManualGrant() returned ANY unacknowledged manual_subscription_grants row for a device_id without validating that the active subscription was actually activated by that manual grant.
root_cause.mechanism: After commit d59dc3f restored pending-gift fetch on the active verify fast path, executeSubscriptionVerify() called getOldestPendingManualGrant() for every active subscriber. The legacy SQL only checked acknowledged_at IS NULL and deleted_at IS NULL. Payment subscribers (transaction_id osm_sp_*), recovery subscribers (recovery:*), and expired/inactive devices with old unacknowledged grants still received manualGift.showPopup=true.
root_cause.ota_cache_note: POST /subscription/recover never returns manualGift. Stale client-side popup state can persist until the next verify refresh; backend fix ensures verify returns manualGift=null for non-manual entitlements so OTA clients self-heal on next poll.
root_cause.not_client_bug: Production device d647ed5740ab1d… had active SonicPesa subscription (osm_sp_1783093130959_3add1c8919) plus unacknowledged manual grant #74 — verify correctly returned popup under legacy logic.

rows_repaired.action: SET acknowledged_at = now() on manual_subscription_grants only

files_changed: server/src/billingStore.js — tightened getOldestPendingManualGrant JOIN + manual_grant transaction guard

commits.render_blocker: RENDER_API_DEPLOY_HOOK not configured — Render deploy workflow fails

strict_eligibility_rule: manualGift only when: acknowledged_at IS NULL, deleted_at IS NULL, device_id matches, subscription active (expires_at > now(), status=active, not manual_admin_blocked), transaction_id ~ ^manual_grant:[0-9]+$, grant.id <= current manual_grant id in transaction_id
confirmation: Only devices with an active manual_grant-linked entitlement and a legitimate unacknowledged grant now receive manualGift popup on VPS. 25 stale grant rows were safely acknowledged. Existing subscription expiry, payment rows, transfers, and offer codes were not modified.
